diagnosis: The level features a long horizontal traversal with ladder-based verticality and enemy variety, but a deep pit near the exit (around x=4000, y=1074) traps the player with no escape — the player fell there three times (final fall at 125s+), could not climb out, and never completed the level. Earlier combat falls at x=102, 2018, 3238 show enemies are threatening but fair. The player trace shows repeated backtracking and re-traversal of early sections after each death, indicating no checkpoints. The comment confirms the pit exceeds max jump height, making it a hard block.

lessons.lesson: A pit deeper than the player's maximum jump height with no climbable walls, ladders, or alternative escape routes creates an inescapable trap that halts progress entirely, regardless of surrounding design quality.
conditions: pit depth exceeds max jump height
no alternative path or mid-level checkpoint before pit
lessons.outcome: player falls repeatedly, cannot recover, spends 2+ minutes trapped, fails to complete level, rates 2/5 despite enjoying enemy placement
